description: Error handling for Braintree transactions, multiparty orders, and agentic commerce

processor_declined.action: Show user-friendly message, suggest alternative payment method

gateway_rejected.description: Rejected by Braintree fraud tools or AVS/CVV rules

reasons.fraud: Flagged as fraudulent by fraud tools

NOT_AUTHORIZED.action: Check partner permissions and Auth Assertion

UNPROCESSABLE_ENTITY.action: Check payload structure and seller status

platform_fee_errors.CURRENCY_MISMATCH: Fee currency doesn't match transaction currency
platform_fee_errors.PAYEE_ACCOUNT_RESTRICTED: Platform fee payee has account restrictions
platform_fee_errors.PLATFORM_FEE_EXCEEDS_AMOUNT: Platform fee greater than purchase amount

braintree.transaction_id: Always log result.transaction.id for Braintree support
braintree.control_panel: Review transactions in Braintree Control Panel → Transactions

best_practices: Map processor decline codes to user-friendly messages
Log all transaction IDs and debug IDs
Implement exponential backoff for retryable errors (3000 series)
Do NOT retry non-retryable declines (2000 series)
Monitor gateway_rejected rates for fraud rule tuning
